name: Stillwater Mining Company
description: Stillwater Mining Company, now a subsidiary of the multinational group Sibanye-Stillwater, is a prominent precious metals mining firm. Originally a US-based company headquartered in Montana, it became part of the Sibanye-Stillwater group following a 2017 acquisition. The company specializes in the extraction and processing of platinum group metals (PGMs), including palladium and platinum. Today, as part of a larger global entity, it maintains significant mining and processing operations across Southern Africa and the United States, positioning itself as a leading global producer of precious metals and a key player in PGM recycling.
